name: Praetorian Acquisition Corp.
business: Praetorian Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has generated no operating revenues to date. The company intends to focus on target businesses in traditional sectors that can be transformed through automation and artificial intelligence.

exposures.sentence: Although we currently intend to focus on target businesses in traditional sectors that can be transformed through the application of automation and artificial intelligence, we may pursue an acquisition opportunity in any business, industry, sector or geographical location.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination (24 months from IPO closing)
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial business combination by January 26, 2028, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering (or by April 26, 2028, which is 27 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, if we have executed a letter of intent, agreement in principle or definitive agreement for an initial business combination within 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering), unless we decide to pursue an amendment to our Charter in order to extend the Combination Period.
